base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of chargin_chuck — a character from 1990 super mario world. Chargin' Chuck — football-player enemy with 8 variants (pitcher/kicker/digger/clapper/etc.). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Chargin' Chuck — football-player enemy with 8 variants (pitcher/kicker/digger/clapper/etc.)
